Title: User Registration with Valid Credentials
Test Data:
- Email: test@example.com
- Password: StrongPassword123
- Name: John Doe
Test Steps:
1. User enters registration details via UI.
2. UI sends the registration data to Firebase/Authentication.
3. Firebase/Authentication validates the data.
4. FireBase/Firestore verifies the validation.
5. Firebase/Authentication sends valid data/token to UI.
6. UI saves the user in the system.
7. UI confirms the data saving.
Expected Result: User is successfully registered and saved in the system.

Title: User Registration with Invalid Credentials
Test Data:
- Email: invalid-email
- Password: WeakPass
- Name: Jane Doe
Test Steps:
1. User enters registration details via UI.
2. UI sends the registration data to Firebase/Authentication.
3. Firebase/Authentication validates the data.
4. FireBase/Firestore verifies the validation.
5. Firebase/Authentication detects invalid data.
6. UI displays an error message.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating invalid registration data.

Title: User Login with Valid Credentials
Test Data:
- Email: test@example.com
- Password: StrongPassword123
Test Steps:
1. User inserts credentials via UI.
2. UI sends the credentials to FirebaseAuthentication.
3. FirebaseAuthentication signs the user.
4. FirebaseAuthentication retrieves user data from FirebaseFirestore.
5. FirebaseAuthentication returns a token to the UI.
6. UI confirms successful login.
Expected Result: User is logged in successfully and receives a token.

Title: Submit Report with Valid Details
Test Data:
- Description: This is a sample report.
- Image: Valid image file
- Coordinates: 40.7128, -74.0060
- Urgency: High
Test Steps:
1. User submits a report via the UI.
2. UI verifies the report details.
3. Firebase uploads the image.
4. FirebaseStorage saves the URL of the image.
5. Firebase finds the nearest entity.
6. Firebase assigns the nearest entity to the report.
7. UI confirms the submission of the report with the assigned entity.
8. Firebase confirms the saving of the report.
Expected Result: Report is submitted successfully with the nearest entity assigned and saved in the system.
